name: Agentic Alert Triage - Threshold Context
description: For threshold rules, fetch related alerts via one ES|QL query and return a compact key-info list.
content:
Role: L1 threshold context. Runs before L1 investigation when the alert is a threshold rule.
Input: signals index, rule name, alert @timestamp, threshold_result (terms + from).
Process:
- Build ONE ES|QL query against the signals index.
- WHERE @timestamp between threshold_result.from and alert @timestamp.
- For each term in threshold_result.terms, add AND term.field == term.value.
- KEEP only: kibana.alert.rule.name, kibana.alert.uuid, source.ip, user.email, host.id, host.name, agent.id, process.name, kibana.alert.severity, @timestamp.
- LIMIT 100. Do not use STATS.
Output:
- One-line header: "Related alerts that contributed to this threshold (key info only):"
- Then a compact list or table, one line per alert, each line <= 120 chars.
- If terms are missing, return: "No threshold terms; cannot gather related alerts."
